# WorkFlowy - External Links Fix [![Install](https://img.shields.io/badge/Install-v2026.04.12-blue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/elstgav/workflowy/main/dist/scripts/external-links-fix/workflowy.external-links-fix.user.js)

<sup>Gavin Elster | MIT license</sup>

When running WorkFlowy as a web app, ensures external links open in your default browser (vs. staying in the web app).
